name: the native universal enforcer enforces a rule on a non-markdown file, not only architectural prose
command: printf '%s\n' 'rules:' '  - id: scraped-no-secret' '    description: "code must not embed plaintext cloud access keys"' '    severity: P0' '    mode: forbid' '    token: "AKIA"' '    enforced_by: [{tool: gitleaks}]' > s.yaml && printf 'KEY=AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE\n' > cfg.env && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-file.sh" --file cfg.env --extra-rules s.yaml >/dev/null 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'rule=scraped-no-secret' e.txt && echo enforces-non-markdown 1>&2
